free_text: Measurement of cumulative photofission yields of 235U
and 238U with a 16 MeV Bremsstrahlung photon beam
Photon flux was determined by photoactivation of Au,
Irradiated for 2 h, cooled for 30 sec, counted for 67 h
Enriched (>90%) metallic uranium core between Zircaloy
Irradiated for 2 h, cooled for 30 sec, counted for 22 h
